title: Femfresh Intimate Skin Care Daily Intimate Wash, 50ml

Intimate Skin Care Daily Intimate Wash
description: Product Description Femfresh Intimate Skin Care Daily Intimate Wash 50ml Our simple, no nonsense formula makes our best seller, the daily intimate wash, the perfect shower partner for you. With just a hint of Aloe Vera to soothe, this gentle pH-balanced bottle of goodness will keep you fresh all day long. Specially designed using a low pH formula to maintain a healthy pH balance and keep your intimate skin happy. Dermatologically and gynaecologically tested by the experts. Hypoallergenic and soap free... so there's no fuss, just loads of love and care. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract, Aloe Barbadensis Extract, Glycerin, Lactic Acid, Sodium Lactate, Triethyl Citrate, Parfum, Maltodextrin, Polyquaternium-39, Dichlorobenzyl Alcohol, Linalool, Limonene, Sodium Benzoate, 2-bromo-2-nitropropane-1,3-diol, Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium Carbonate, Ci 14720, Ci 15510 Safety Warning For external use only. Keep away from eyes. Keep out of reach of children. Manufacturer Contact Information Wear Bay Road Folkstone Kent Ct19 6Pg See more
